title: TypeScript
description: CReact is written in TypeScript. Here's how to get the most out of the type system for signals, props, and components.
tsconfig_intro: The key setting is jsxImportSource. This tells TypeScript to use CReact's JSX types:
typed_signals_intro: Signals infer their type from the initial value, or you can specify it explicitly:
info_types: CReact re-exports key types: Accessor, Setter, MaybeAccessor, SignalOptions, MemoOptions, Owner, Context, and all runtime types.
